1.title: All Your Cards in One Place
1.description: Add your credit cards, track your debts, and never miss a payment date. Take control with installment calculators and restructuring simulators.

2.title: Golden Window Notifications
2.description: Minimize interest payments by shopping during the "golden window" period after the statement closing date. Get notified at the right time with smart alerts.

3.title: Family Budget & Income/Expenses
3.description: Record your income and expenses, create a zero-based budget. Track your subscriptions, recurring expenses, and see how much you can spend.

4.title: Bank Accounts & Overdraft
4.description: Track your checking accounts, calculate overdraft interest. Support for 30+ banks with all your accounts in one place.

5.title: Savings Goals & Shared Wallet
5.description: Set savings goals for your dreams and track your progress. Create shared wallets with friends and easily split expenses.

6.title: Loan Simulator & Findeks
6.description: Calculate mortgage, auto, or personal loans (up to 120 months). Simulate your Findeks score and get tips to improve it.

7.title: AI Insights
7.description: AI-powered spending analysis, budget recommendations, and debt strategies. Get instant answers to your financial questions in natural language.

8.title: Privacy & Security
8.description: Lock your app with a PIN code. Hide all amounts with privacy mode. Your data is stored only on your device.

9.title: Cloud Backup
9.description: Safely back up your data to the cloud. Never lose your data when switching devices — restore with one tap.

10.title: 7 Days Free Premium
10.description: Unlimited access to all features, detailed analysis reports, CSV/PDF export, and multi-currency support. Try it free now!

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Grant the following permissions for a better experience

notification.title: Notifications
notification.description: Would you like to receive payment reminders and golden window alerts?

camera.title: Camera
camera.description: Camera access is needed for the receipt scanning feature
